name: MAC - Get list of past leads for Email Marketing

content.query:
SELECT
cst.[CustomerID]
,cst.FirstName
,cst.LastName
,cst.[Email]
,brn.LongName as [Market]
,lds.EntryDate
,lds.GrossSalesAmount
,lds.LP_DispositionID
,lds.LP_ProductID
FROM 
[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
,[EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
where 
cst.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
and lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
and lds.Sold = 'True'
and cst.OperatingCompany = 'MAC'
--and lds.EntryDate > '2022-01-01' 
and brn.LongName = 'Green Bay'
and cst.Email is not NULL
